title: Kerala polls: After the K.M. Mani era, Pala faces its most open contest yet
description: While the incumbent MLA Mani C. Kappen of the UDF is confident of a repeat win, Jose K. Mani is banking on the heavy organisational depth of KC(M) to carry forward K.M. Mani’s success story in Pala. The BJP is vying to expand its base through Shone George by winning over Catholic votes
